_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 13 IQM (Ingredient Quality Map) parent-category buckets used to classify active-ingredient parents. Drives evidence/UI grouping in the Flutter app and integrity-gate enforcement in db_integrity_sanity_check.py.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for IQM parent-category labels and descriptions. The 13 categories are clinician-locked; adding or removing requires a coordinated review.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/ingredient_quality_map.json `category` field (627 parents, 13 distinct values verified 2026-06-07).

field_contract.name: User-facing label.
field_contract.notes: ≤200-char plain-English description shown in tap-to-learn modal.
field_contract.examples: Up to 5 ingredient names users might recognize from this category.

iqm_categories.name: Amino Acids
iqm_categories.notes: Free-form amino acids and amino-acid derivatives (taurine, glutamine, etc.). Building blocks for proteins and neurotransmitters.

iqm_categories.name: Antioxidants
iqm_categories.notes: Compounds that scavenge reactive oxygen species or upregulate endogenous antioxidant defenses. Largest IQM bucket by parent count.

iqm_categories.name: Enzymes
iqm_categories.notes: Active enzyme supplements — digestive, systemic, or fibrinolytic. Smallest IQM bucket; highly specialized.

iqm_categories.name: Fatty Acids
iqm_categories.notes: Omega-3, omega-6, and other long-chain fatty-acid supplements. Includes triglyceride, ethyl ester, phospholipid, and free-fatty-acid forms.

iqm_categories.name: Fibers
iqm_categories.notes: Soluble and insoluble dietary fibers, prebiotics, and resistant starches.

iqm_categories.name: Functional Foods
iqm_categories.notes: Whole-food extracts and concentrates with bioactive evidence beyond basic nutrition (e.g. tart cherry, beetroot powder).

iqm_categories.name: Herbs
iqm_categories.notes: Botanical extracts and whole-plant powders. Largest active-ingredient category; covers adaptogens, nervines, hepatics, and more.

iqm_categories.name: Mushroom Extracts
iqm_categories.notes: Fungal mushroom powders and extracts. Form quality reflects fruiting body, mycelium, and standardization disclosure rather than systemic absorption.

iqm_categories.name: Minerals
iqm_categories.notes: Essential and trace minerals in salt, chelate, or organic-acid forms. Bioavailability varies dramatically by form.

iqm_categories.name: Other Bioactives
iqm_categories.notes: Compounds that don't fit the other 11 buckets — hormones (DHEA), nucleotides (NAD+ precursors), miscellaneous bioactives.

iqm_categories.name: Probiotics
iqm_categories.notes: Live microbial strains with documented health-benefit evidence. Strain identity is essential for evidence transfer.

iqm_categories.name: Proteins
iqm_categories.notes: Whole-protein supplements — whey, casein, plant proteins, collagen, peptides.

iqm_categories.name: Vitamins
iqm_categories.notes: Fat- and water-soluble vitamins in active or precursor forms. Methylated B-vitamins and active D3/K2 forms have higher bioavailability.
